response.step_by_step_log:
1. Video Analysis: Identified Murasaki Shion as the performer (from #紫咲シオン卒業LIVE in title/on-screen text). Song 1 identified as "Mikazuki" via on-screen text. Song 2 identified at 03:44 as "Dareka no shinzou ni nareta nara" (Lyrics/Music: YurryCanon).
2. Metadata Resolution:
   - Song 1: "Mikazuki" by Sayuri, performed by Murasaki Shion.
   - Song 2: "Dareka no shinzou ni nareta nara" by YurryCanon, performed by Murasaki Shion.
3. Web Search: 
   - Used: `"Mikazuki" Sayuri Japanese and English lyrics`
   - Used: `"Dareka no shinzou ni nareta nara" YurryCanon Japanese and English lyrics`
4. JSON Construction: Compiled the metadata, descriptions, and lyrics for both identified songs into the requested JSON format.
response.global_summary: A segment from Murasaki Shion's graduation concert, in which she performs covers of "Mikazuki" (originally by Sayuri) and "Dareka no shinzou ni nareta nara" (originally by YurryCanon).

scenes.description: Murasaki Shion performs a cover of the song "Mikazuki". On-screen text at the beginning of the video identifies the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
今宵も頭上では 綺麗な満月がキラキラ
幸せそうに世界を照らしている
当の私は 出来損ないでどうしようも無くて
夜明け夢見ては 地べた這いずり回ってる
それでも 誰かに見つけて欲しくて
夜空見上げて叫んでいる
逃げ出したくて 泣き出したくて
それでも 誰にも負けたくなくて
宇宙の隅で藻掻いている
追い付きたいや 追い越したい
あぁ 夢に見たような世界
ねぇ それでも誰かと比べてばかり
周りを見ては 立ち止まって
欠けたものを探した
そんな自分を変えたい
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Tonight, the beautiful full moon is sparkling in the sky again
Seemingly happy, it illuminates the world
I, the runaway, am a failure and hopeless
I'm looking up to the sky as I scream!
I really wanna run away, but I can't
I can't even imagine there being a bright future
Flying up with these insufficient wings, I'm an ugly child of a star: a new moon.
Sleeping as it's held in someone's arms.
I'm alone in the night, being crushed.
I really wanna run away, but I can't
I can't even imagine there being a bright future
Flying up with these insufficient wings, I'm an ugly child of a star: a new moon.

scenes.description: Murasaki Shion performs a cover of the song "Dareka no shinzou ni nareta nara". On-screen text at 03:44 identifies the song and creator.
scenes.song_title: Dareka no shinzou ni nareta nara
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
「こんな世界」と嘆くだれかの
生きる理由になれるでしょうか
これは僕が いま君に贈る
最初で最期の愛の言葉だ
街も人も歪み出した
化け物だと気付いたんだ
だれかの心臓になれたなら
愛に溶けていけたら
どうか、どうか、またあの日と同じように
傘を差し出し笑って見せてよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Those who cry out 'What a world'...
Can I become the reason you live?
This is the first and last love letter I'll send to you now.
I realized that the city and the people were distorted, that they were monsters.
If I could become someone's heart,
I wouldn't care if I melted in love.
So please, please, just like that day,
Show me your smile and hold out your umbrella.
